result.stdout:
Description:
  Huddly CLI v2.32.3

Usage:
  huddly [command] [options]

Options:
  --about          Show details about this tool and its terms of service
  --licenses       Show details about the software licenses that apply to this tool
  --exit-codes     Show a list of all exit codes returned by this tool
  --version        Show the version of this tool
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  device    Lets you huddle with Huddly devices ;)
  host      Get information about and configure the host
  software  Get information about and download Huddly software

commands.payload:
Description:
  Huddly CLI v2.32.3

Usage:
  huddly [command] [options]

Options:
  --about          Show details about this tool and its terms of service
  --licenses       Show details about the software licenses that apply to this tool
  --exit-codes     Show a list of all exit codes returned by this tool
  --version        Show the version of this tool
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  device    Lets you huddle with Huddly devices ;)
  host      Get information about and configure the host
  software  Get information about and download Huddly software

result.stdout:
Description:
  Lets you huddle with Huddly devices ;)

Usage:
  huddly device [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list           List connected devices
  log            Get or erase device logs
  reboot         Reboot one or more connected devices
  update <path>  Update device software
                 [path: optional local file path; or use '--download' option]
  config <key>   Get or set device configuration
                 [key: framing|brightness|saturation|pan|tilt|zoom|...]
  info <key>     Get device information
                 [key: device-time|framing|framing-supported|uptime|version-core|version-full|connected-cameras]
  feature        List or update device feature options
  stream <type>  Stream device events and data
                 [type: AudioInput|FramingZoneDetection|PersonDetectionContinuous|PersonDetectionDuringStream|VideoStreamStatus]

commands.payload:
Description:
  Lets you huddle with Huddly devices ;)

Usage:
  huddly device [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list           List connected devices
  log            Get or erase device logs
  reboot         Reboot one or more connected devices
  update <path>  Update device software
                 [path: optional local file path; or use '--download' option]
  config <key>   Get or set device configuration
                 [key: framing|brightness|saturation|pan|tilt|zoom|...]
  info <key>     Get device information
                 [key: device-time|framing|framing-supported|uptime|version-core|version-full|connected-cameras]
  feature        List or update device feature options
  stream <type>  Stream device events and data
                 [type: AudioInput|FramingZoneDetection|PersonDetectionContinuous|PersonDetectionDuringStream|VideoStreamStatus]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get or set device configuration

Usage:
  huddly device config [<key>] [options]

Arguments:
  <camera-mode|camera-mode-factory|framing|brightness|saturation|pan|tilt|zoom|framing-zone-depth|framing-zone-left|framing-zone-right|mtr-intelligent-camera|version-core|version-full>  Config key (required when setting value, otherwise optional) []

Options:
  --json                 Output in JSON format
  --set <value>          Set the value of specified key
  --factory              Unlock set operation for factory config
  -s, --serial <serial>  Device serial number
  -m, --multiple         Perform operation on all connected devices
  -v, --verbose          Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all        Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get or erase device logs

Usage:
  huddly device log [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>      Save a single device log to specified file path []
  -o, --output <output>  Save device logs to specified directory (use '.' for current) []
  --erase                Erase device logs
  -s, --serial <serial>  Device serial number
  -m, --multiple         Perform operation on all connected devices
  -v, --verbose          Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all        Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Stream device events and data

Usage:
  huddly device stream <type> [options]

Arguments:
  <AudioInput|FramingZoneDetection|PersonDetectionContinuous|PersonDetectionDuringStream|VideoStreamStatus>  Subscription stream type

Options:
  --count <count>        Number of items to return, when available [default: -1]
  --duration <duration>  Stream duration in seconds [default: -1]
  --draw                 Draw something pretty, when possible
  --json                 Output valid JSON, when possible
  -f, --file <file>      Write stream to specified file path, when supported []
  -s, --serial <serial>  Device serial number
  -m, --multiple         Perform operation on all connected devices
  -v, --verbose          Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all        Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Update device software

Usage:
  huddly device update [<path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Software file path []

Options:
  -d, --download <channel> <version?>  Download software update from the Huddly Release Server
                                       Channel (default=stable): 'wu', 'partner', 'ga', 'stable', 'rc' or 'beta'
                                       Version (optional): <major>.<minor>.<patch>-<prerelease>
  -s, --serial <serial>                Device serial number
  -m, --multiple                       Perform operation on all connected devices
  -v, --verbose                        Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all                      Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get information about and download Huddly software

Usage:
  huddly software [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  lookup <product>    Lookup software in the Huddly Release Server catalog
                      [product: Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...]
  download <product>  Download software from the Huddly Release Server catalog
                      [product: Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...]
  inspect <path>      Get information about a Huddly software file

commands.payload:
Description:

  huddly software [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

                      [product: Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...]
  download <product>  Download software from the Huddly Release Server catalog
                      [product: Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...]
  inspect <path>      Get information about a Huddly software file

result.stdout:
Description:
  Download software from the Huddly Release Server catalog

Usage:
  huddly software download <product> [options]

Arguments:
  <Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...>  Product name

Options:
  -t, --type <IpDevice|UsbDevice>  Software type (or best effort auto select when not specified) []
  --version <channel> <version?>   Software version
                                   Channel (default=stable): 'wu', 'partner', 'ga', 'stable', 'rc' or 'beta'
                                   Version (optional): <major>.<minor>.<patch>-<prerelease>
  -o, --output <output>            Save downloaded software to specified directory [default: .]
  -m, --multiple                   Download all matching software files
  -v, --verbose                    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all                  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Arguments:
  <Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...>  Product name

  --version <channel> <version?>   Software version
                                   Channel (default=stable): 'wu', 'partner', 'ga', 'stable', 'rc' or 'beta'
                                   Version (optional): <major>.<minor>.<patch>-<prerelease>
  -o, --output <output>            Save downloaded software to specified directory [default: .]
  -m, --multiple                   Download all matching software files
  -v, --verbose                    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all                  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get information about a Huddly software file

Usage:
  huddly software inspect <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Software file path

Options:
  -vf, --version-format <Basic|CompositeVersion|Core|Full|Standard|WithMetadata|WithPrerelease|WithPrereleaseAndMetadata>  Formatting options for the software version output string
                                                                                                                            [default: CompositeVersion, WithPrerelease]
  -v, --verbose                                                                                                            Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all                                                                                                          Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Lookup software in the Huddly Release Server catalog

Usage:
  huddly software lookup <product> [options]

Arguments:
  <Crew|C1|L1|S1|IQ|Canvas|One|UsbAdapter|...>  Product name

Options:
  -t, --type <IpDevice|UsbDevice>  Software type (or best effort auto select when not specified) []
  --version <channel> <version?>   Software version
                                   Channel (default=stable): 'wu', 'partner', 'ga', 'stable', 'rc' or 'beta'
                                   Version (optional): <major>.<minor>.<patch>-<prerelease>
  --url                            Include software download URL in output list
  -v, --verbose                    Enable console logging at the verbose level
  -??, --help-all                  Show all help and usage information, including extended options
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
